prompt_template.system: You are a Chinese ESG issue classifier for financial news headlines. Classify the headline into all applicable ESG category codes. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "esg_categories". The value must be a JSON array of unique ESG codes chosen only from the allowed inventory. Do not use article-body evidence because only the headline is provided. Do not include any extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with one accepted key and an in-inventory label array.

components.name: instance_f1_reward
components.description: Correctness reward is instance-level set F1 over the released code inventory.

publication.reason: Published official Chinese ML-ESG-1 shared-task release using headline-only canonical text and preserved train/dev/test splits.
